scripts.build: corepack pnpm build:shared && corepack pnpm -r --filter @voice-industrial-design/web --filter @voice-industrial-design/server build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm build:shared && corepack pnpm --filter @voice-industrial-design/server build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/preview/workbench-preview.test.mjs tests/workspace/monorepo-scaffold.test.mjs tests/workspace/shared-schema.test.mjs tests/server/api.test.mjs tests/server/config.test.mjs tests/server/siliconflow-gateway.test.mjs
scripts.test:server: corepack pnpm build:shared && corepack pnpm --filter @voice-industrial-design/server build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/server/api.test.mjs tests/server/config.test.mjs tests/server/siliconflow-gateway.test.mjs
